reasoning: VIX at 17.86 (MID regime) with flat direction (0.28% overnight change) provides a neutral IV backdrop — no strong bullish compression tailwind. Yesterday's tape ended weak (SPY -0.41%, XLK -0.88%, XLE -0.35%), and ribbon shows BEAR stack (72¢ spread) = structural bearish bias into open. Moderate conviction due to VIX not rising — a rising VIX would cement bearish bias, but flat VIX leaves room for consolidation or reversal.
